scenarios.name: delayed_packets
scenarios.description: Delayed telemetry packets trigger degraded then recovered state.

scenarios.name: missing_telemetry
scenarios.description: Packet loss triggers stale communication behavior.

scenarios.name: stale_sensor_data
scenarios.description: LiDAR dropout creates degraded localization and sensor fault visibility.

scenarios.name: invalid_localization
scenarios.description: Invalid localization is rejected and escalates to emergency fallback.

scenarios.name: degraded_estimator_confidence
scenarios.description: Low estimator confidence produces emergency fallback visibility.

scenarios.name: command_rejection
scenarios.description: Command rejection is surfaced through policy state and command channel visibility.
